title: default pvp and cpvp
description: Most of the modpack went into optimization and PvP, but the majority went into optimization
body:
# ⚔️ Default pvp and cpvp

**The pack for those who play to win.**  
Minimum lag, maximum control, zero visual clutter.

---

## 🎯 Who is this modpack for?

- Players on **not-so-powerful PCs** who need a stable 60+ FPS in battles
- Experienced PvP players who find vanilla clients lacking essential features
- Anyone tired of lag, crashes, and stutters during crucial fights

---

## ⚡ Key Features

| Category | What it provides |
|----------|------------------|
| **Optimization** | 2-5x more FPS, faster chunk loading, near-zero render latency |
| **Convenience** | Zoom on keybind, item hotkeys, ammo counter (for crossbows/bows), enhanced HUD |
| **Fair Play** | **No** cheats, autoclickers, or unfair advantages. Only server-allowed client-side improvements |

---

## 📦 What's Inside (Core Mods)

> *This list is tailored for Fabric 1.21.4 — if you're on a different version, simply replace with equivalents.*

### 🚀 Optimization
- **Sodium** — Global renderer speedup (+300% FPS)
- **Lithium** — Game & server logic optimization
- **Entity Culling** — Doesn't render entities you can't see
- **ImmediatelyFast** — Speeds up UI rendering
- **ModernFix** — Fixes memory leaks and micro-stutters

### ⚔️ PvP / Client Improvements
- **Zoomify** — Convenient hold-to-zoom (default: V)
- **Mouse Tweaks** — Convenient item management (drag-sorting)
- **Status Effect Timer** — Timers on effects (speed, regeneration, etc.)

---

---

## 🕹️ Controls (Default Keybinds)

- **C** — Open Zoomify menu (to change the zoom key)
- **V** — Hold to zoom
- **R** — Reload / sort inventory
- **U** — Open REI (item list)
- **P** — Show/hide damage indicator
- **F3 + Q** — Show all control combinations (vanilla Minecraft help)

> *All keys can be rebound in **Options → Controls**.*

---

## ✅ Advantages Over Other PvP Packs

- **Minimalism** — Only what's needed for gameplay and optimization, no decorative mods
- **Stability** — Tested compatibility between all mods
- **Fair Play** — No hidden advantages, allowed on most servers
- **Simplicity** — Install and play, no configuration needed

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the `.mrpack` file from this project.
2. Import it into the **Modrinth Launcher** (Import from file) or any other launcher that supports the Modrinth format.
3. Allocate **at least 2 GB of RAM** to the game (in your launcher settings).
4. Launch and enjoy!

---

## 📜 License

This pack is provided "as is". All mods belong to their respective authors and are used in accordance with their licenses. You are free to modify the pack for personal use, but do not re-upload it under your own name without credit.

---

## ❓ FAQ

**Will I get banned for using this modpack on servers?**  
No, if the server allows client-side improvements (Sodium, Zoom, indicators). On servers with strict anti-cheat, some mods (like Damage Indicator) may not work, but you won't get banned — the game will simply skip rendering them.

**Why no OptiFine?**  
Sodium + Lithium provide better FPS and are more compatible with other mods. If you need shaders, you can install Iris separately.

**Can I add my own mods?**  
Yes. The pack is easily expandable — just install additional mods through your launcher.

---
